g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I talk to the Mayor?')
g.text: 1. You tell the Mayor what to build

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Mayor create beads?')
sendPrompt('What is a convoy and is it optional?')
sendPrompt('What exactly does gt sling do?')
g.text: 4. gt sling — spawns polecat + hangs on hook
Creates worktree, attaches bead to polecat's hook

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the GUPP principle in Gas Town')
g.text: 5. GUPP: hook has work → RUN IT
gt prime fires, polecat works immediately, no waiting

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Witness detect stuck polecats?')
g.text: Witness monitors — nudges stuck agents, triggers handoff if needed

svg.text: If crash or context full → gt handoff → state saved to hook → fresh polecat resumes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a polecat runs gt done?')
g.text: Branch pushed, MR bead created, polecat terminates

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Refinery bisecting merge queue work?')
g.text: Batch verify, bisect failures, land clean MRs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a convoy completes?')
